items.title: That new White House app looks all sorts of problematic under the hood
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Social media firms must better enforce Australia under-16 ban, watchdog says
items.dek: Regulator eSafety says it has concerns about how Facebook, Instagram, Snapchat, TikTok and YouTube are complying with the ban.
items.body: Regulator eSafety says it has concerns about how Facebook, Instagram, Snapchat, TikTok and YouTube are complying with the ban.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Palestinians convicted of deadly attacks face death penalty under new Israeli law
items.dek: The new law, passed on Monday, was pushed hard by the far-right and Security Minister Itamar Ben-Gvir.
items.body: The new law, passed on Monday, was pushed hard by the far-right and Security Minister Itamar Ben-Gvir.
